name: scheduler
description: Async task queue that runs claude-code sessions on your behalf within configured time windows and usage limits

scripts.check: for f in src/runners/*.sh; do bash -n "$f"; done && node --check src/queue/store.js && node --check src/runners/index.js && node --check src/worker/poller.js && node --check src/web/server.js && node --check src/terminals/store.js
